summary: Integration tests for the storage package using a real SQLite DB in t.TempDir(), covering channels, messages, and message summaries

observations.text: All tests use openTestStore which creates a real SQLite file in t.TempDir(). No mocking — tests exercise the full SQL layer including migrations.
seedChannelAndMessages is a shared helper that creates a channel and N messages spaced 1 hour apart. Used to set up consistent fixtures across summary tests.
TestMessageSummary_CreateUpsert verifies that calling Create twice for the same message_id preserves the original row ID and updates summary/model — confirming the ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE semantics.
TestMessageSummary_GetUnsummarizedByChannels_NilReturnsAll verifies the nil-channelIDs fallback path in GetUnsummarizedMessagesByChannels.
